CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the national performance database. Do not change this picklist or hide this field from the layout. Count of number of household members under 18. This would be a roll-up sum field if the limit of summary fields were not already reached.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of number of Household Members under 18.
CustomField.label: Number of Children in Household
